name: InnoNav Base Ruleset
description: Minimum ruleset - disables noisy and overlapping rules. Start here and increase to Core, then Full.

rules.justification: Only use BEGIN..END to enclose compound statements. Disabled in favor of INN0003.
The 'if' keyword should always start a line.
Variable declarations should be ordered by type.
The name of variables and parameters must be suffixed with the type or object name.
The name of temporary variable must be prefixed with Temp.
The table does not contain a key with the field.
Use a text constant or label for format string in StrSubstNo.
The Tooltip property must be filled. Covered by INN0008.
You must use all lowercase letters for reserved keyword 'True'/'False'.
Use the this keyword for codeunit self-reference. Overlaps CM0040.
Variable with placeholders should have a comment explaining their content.
DataPerCompany must be explicitly set. Disabled by default. (migrated from LC0007)
DropDown and Brick fieldgroups must be defined. Disabled by default. (migrated from LC0023)
Locked Label must have a suffix Tok. Disabled by default. (migrated from LC0047)
Tok suffix for matching label values. (migrated from LC0055)
Return value of Get must be used for error handling. (migrated from LC0084)
Missing permissions to access tabledata. (migrated from LC0068)
Tok label locking. Overlaps AC0020/AC0021.
FlowFields must not be editable. Overlaps PC0001.
Commit() must have a comment. Overlaps DC0001.
Hardcoded IDs in functions. Overlaps LC0003.
Caption is missing. Overlaps AC0011.
Procedure must not end with semicolon. Overlaps FC0001.
Procedure visibility/documentation. Overlaps DC0004.
ToolTip must end with a dot. Overlaps AC0014.
Position for global variables, triggers and methods. Can be noisy.
Access/Extensible properties. Overlaps PC0005/PC0006.
Mandatory affixes. Depends on AppSourceCop.json config.
Empty captions should be locked. Overlaps AC0018.
AutoCalcFields on normal fields. Overlaps PC0007.
Enum zero reserved for empty. Overlaps AC0019.
TransferFields matching. Overlaps PC0020/PC0021.
Record.Get() argument validation. Overlaps PC0013.
Option data type not allowed. Overlaps LC0088.
Unused object. Disabled by default in CompanialCop.
Table relation value too long. Overlaps PC0028.
Unused global procedure. Disabled by default in CompanialCop.
Event publishers must be local. Overlaps AC0024.
Parenthesis on function calls. Overlaps FC0003.
Temp records should not trigger table triggers. Overlaps PC0027.
Add 'this' qualification. Overlaps AA0248.
Empty statements should have a comment. (migrated from LC0069)
Function calls should have parenthesis. (migrated from LC0077)
FlowField detection. Informational only.
Maintainability Index metric. Informational. (split from old LC0009)
Maintainability Index threshold. (split from old LC0010)
Cyclomatic Complexity metric. Informational. (split from old LC0009)
Cyclomatic Complexity threshold. (split from old LC0010)
Internal procedure only used in declaring object. Consider making it local.
Cognitive Complexity metric. Informational, can be noisy.
Extensible property should be explicitly set. (migrated from LC0034)
Access property should be explicitly set. (migrated from LC0011)
Event subscriber var keyword mismatch. (migrated from LC0065)
Do not assign a text to a target with smaller size. (migrated from LC0051)
